rulings.Case Title: REGARDING THE KAUPKE FAMILY TRUST, LEE AND CHARLEEN KAUPKE, SETTLORS, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Petition Of Karen J Casey For Order That Trustee Satisfy Judgment From Amounts Which Beneficiary Kurt Kaupke Is Entitled; Declaration Of John R Lister And Proposed Amended Petition Attached Hereto
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Karen J. Casey's Motion to Amend Petition to Satisfy Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Petitioner to submit an order to the Court. Any party who wishes to appear to argue the matter must advise the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 6/12/13.
